# MedTutor - Project Context for AI Agents

> **Purpose**: This file provides context for LLMs/AI agents to understand the project structure and goals quickly.

## 🧠 Core Identity
- **Name**: MedTutor UNIOESTE
- **Goal**: Help students pass the UNIOESTE Medicine Entrance Exam.
- **Tech Stack**: React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite.
- **AI Engine**: Google Gemini (via `@google/genai`).

## 📂 Key Files & Logic
- `App.tsx`: Main router/layout logic. Handles state persistence and view switching.
- `geminiService.ts`: **CRITICAL**. Contains all AI prompts for:
    - Weekly Plan Generation (`generateStudyPlan`)
    - Tutor Responses (`getTutorResponse`) - Context-aware.
    - Quiz Generation (`generateLargeQuizFromContext`).
    - Study Tracks (`generateStudyTrack`).
- `components/Onboarding.tsx`: Handles user profile creation (Name, Hours, Difficulties, Learning Style).
- `components/Dashboard.tsx`: Displays daily missions, streak, and Pomodoro timer.
- `types.ts`: Shared interfaces (`UserProfile`, `WeeklyPlan`, `Message`, `QuizItem`).

## 🎨 Design System
- **Framework**: Tailwind CSS (v3).
- **Theme**: "Peaceful" aesthetic (using `brand-` and `surface-` custom colors defined in `tailwind.config.js`).
- **Icons**: Lucide React.
- **Responsiveness**: Mobile-first design.

## 🔄 State Management
- **Persistence**: `localStorage` (keys: `medtutor_profile`, `medtutor_plan`, `medtutor_chat_history`).
- **No Backend**: Client-side only architecture. AI API calls are direct from client (using secure Env Vars).

## 🚀 Deployment
- **Platform**: Vercel.
- **Environment Variables**: `VITE_GEMINI_API_KEY` (MUST be set in Vercel Dashboard).
- **Build Command**: `npm run build` (Vite).

## 📝 Contribution Guidelines
- Ensure clean, typed code.
- Always update `types.ts` when changing data structures.
- Prioritize user experience (UX) for students.
